spec.description: Service health, Swift package traffic, object-storage calls, runtime behavior, logs, and traces for the Tuist Registry service.
Request rate by normalized Phoenix route and method. Dynamic package identifiers are not used as route labels.
spec.title: Requests by Route

spec.description: 95th percentile request latency by normalized Phoenix route.
spec.title: Request Latency by Route

spec.description: Packages with the most source-archive download redirects in the selected time range.
spec.title: Top Archive Downloads

spec.description: Packages with the most manifest responses in the selected time range.
spec.title: Top Manifest Reads

spec.description: Object-storage existence-check request rates split by result, including cache hits, found objects, missing objects, rate limits, and errors.
spec.title: Object-Storage Existence Checks

spec.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (env, result, le) (rate(tuist_registry_s3_head_duration_milliseconds_bucket{env=~"$environment", pod=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])))

spec.description: 95th percentile object-storage existence-check latency split by result.
spec.title: Object-Storage Existence-Check p95

spec.expr: 100 * sum by (env, url) (tuist_registry_prom_ex_finch_pool_in_use_connections{env=~"$environment", pod=~"$pod"}) / clamp_min(sum by (env, url) (tuist_registry_prom_ex_finch_pool_size{env=~"$environment", pod=~"$pod"}), 1)
